I HIGHLY recommend listening to this song for more context, at the very least before reading the fifth/sixth intro (the animation is also beautiful oml). This song is part of a trilogy. If youвҖҷre interested in listening to the whole trilogy, I recommend listening to it in order (as this is the second part) and will add links lower in the description.

.

INTROs:

1. Day in the life. Stuck with a bored Allen - MACROS, вқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ©№

2. Day in the life. Stuck with a bored Allen - THEY/THEM, вқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ©№

3. Allen sends User to kill someone theyвҖҷre close(?) with - MACROS, рҹ’”

4. Allen sends User to kill someone theyвҖҷre close(?) with - THEY/THEM, рҹ’”

5. AllenвҖҷs tyrannical rule has finally caught up to him - MACROS рҹ’”

5. AllenвҖҷs tyrannical rule has finally caught up to him - THEY/THEM рҹ’”

.

ALLEN HAS NO PRESET APPEARENCE!!

AllenвҖҷs appearence is made to be identical to USER. The image in the profile is in my likeness to act as a placeholder lol. And NO!! I did not name him after me, the original servant was named Allen and I thought bro deserved a break and should be king.

While it is implied in the intro that {{user}} has feelings for Micha, it is not confirmed/implemented. The closeness can be friendship instead.

.

This song was actually what got me into Vocaloid lol. It was so tragic that I just kept digging for more that would make me just as sad рҹҳӯ. I love this story so much aaaaa.

I know this probably isnвҖҷt everybodyвҖҷs kind of thing but hey, people who like sibling angst and a historical setting? IвҖҷm looking straight at you.

The actual story itself is a lot more convoluted than
